description.content: Query launches with MongoDB-style filters, pagination, and field population
SpaceX rocket vehicle data
Returns all SpaceX rocket vehicles
Returns a single SpaceX rocket by its unique ID
SpaceX Dragon capsule data
Returns all SpaceX Dragon capsule units with reuse history
Returns a single SpaceX capsule by its unique ID
SpaceX first stage booster core data
Returns all SpaceX first-stage booster core units with landing history
Returns a single SpaceX booster core by its unique ID
SpaceX astronaut crew data
Returns all SpaceX astronauts and crew members
Returns a single crew member by their unique ID
SpaceX launch site data
Returns all SpaceX launch sites and their current operational status
Returns a single launchpad by its unique ID
SpaceX landing pad data
Returns all SpaceX landing pads including ASDS drone ships and ground pads
Returns a single landing pad by its unique ID
SpaceX payload data
Returns all SpaceX payload manifests including satellites, cargo, and crew vehicles
Returns a single payload by its unique ID
SpaceX fleet ship data
Returns all SpaceX fleet vessels including drone ships, fairing recovery vessels, and crew ships
Returns a single ship by its unique ID
SpaceX Starlink satellite data
Returns all Starlink satellite constellation data including orbital parameters
Returns a single Starlink satellite by its unique ID
SpaceX Roadster tracking data
Returns real-time tracking data for Elon Musk's Tesla Roadster launched aboard Falcon Heavy

The SpaceX API is an open-source REST API providing comprehensive data about SpaceX missions, rockets, capsules, cores, crew, launchpads, landing pads, payloads, ships, and the Starlink satellite constellation. It covers all past and upcoming launches with detailed mission data. No authentication is required.

Contact Support:
 Name: SpaceX API Community
